name: already-in-design-log-phase-b
query: We're mid-way through the /design-log Phase B research step for this feature — can you check what the current best practice is for rate-limiting a Next.js API route before we finalize the plan?
expected_behavior: Recognizes the user is already inside a /design-log Phase B run
Does not invoke tech-researcher separately since design-log Phase B already handles this research
Continues the research within the existing design-log flow instead of duplicating it as a standalone tech-researcher pass
_notes: Negative trigger: explicitly listed non-trigger in the skill file — duplicates /design-log Phase B's own research handling.
